description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular layout with three main sections, each with distinct rooms and open spaces. The exterior combines white and black walls with wood paneling and large glass windows, especially prominent on one side, allowing for ample natural light. A wooden picket fence encloses two sides, creating small outdoor patios or garden areas. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, some with visible furniture and shelving, and the floors appear to be finished with light materials. The roof is flat, and the overall design is minimalist with clean lines and a functional arrangement. The windows and doors are arranged asymmetrically, contributing to a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white, black, and wood-paneled exteriors, large glass windows, and fenced patios. The layout is rectangular and divided into multiple rooms with a minimalist, urban design.
description_view_0: This view shows the front facade with two main sections, visible windows, doors, and fenced patios on either side.
description_view_1: From this angle, the large glass window and wood paneling are prominent, revealing interior furnishings and a clear view of the room layout.
description_view_2: This side highlights the white walls, multiple doors, and the arrangement of rooms, with the fenced patio extending along the length.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the flat roof, back entrances, and the continuation of the fence, with less window exposure compared to the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
